markdown:
![Thumbnail (1920x1080)](https://i.ytimg.com/vi/f-G6kc1dzm0/maxresdefault.jpg)
# [11 Small but Useful Neovim Plugins](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=f-G6kc1dzm0)

**Visibility**: Public
**Uploaded by**: [Coding with Sphere](http://www.youtube.com/@codingwithsphere)
**Uploaded at**: 2025-11-04T14:00:51-08:00
**Published at**: 2025-11-04T14:00:51-08:00
**Length**: 13:05
**Views**: 27203
**Likes**: 1083
**Category**: Entertainment

## Description

```
11 Small but Useful Neovim Plugins

Thanks for watching! This is just a handful of "smaller" plugins that I find useful in my configuration. I hope you found this useful!

00:00 start
00:43 flash.nvim
03:20 fidget.nvim
04:19 vim-tpipeline
06:28 nvim-colorizer
07:00 vim-tmux-navigator
08:29 nvim-treesitter-textobjects
09:49 tabout.nvim
10:17 Comment.nvim
10:48 treesj, nvim-autopairs, mini.surround

Plugins Links (in order):
- https://github.com/folke/flash.nvim
- https://github.com/j-hui/fidget.nvim
- https://github.com/vimpostor/vim-tpipeline
- https://github.com/norcalli/nvim-colorizer.lua
- https://github.com/christoomey/vim-tmux-navigator
- https://github.com/nvim-treesitter/nvim-treesitter-textobjects
- https://github.com/abecodes/tabout.nvim
- https://github.com/numToStr/Comment.nvim
- https://github.com/Wansmer/treesj
- https://github.com/windwp/nvim-autopairs
- https://github.com/nvim-mini/mini.surround

Support me on Patreon!
https://patreon.com/codingwithsphere

Music from:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=DGTFqaQh26w&t=447s
```
